author: mr jp
body:
Hey, I was there too ! I was second row from the front !! Oh man , that was such an awesome show …

I recorded whole songs, but I was too near the speakers that the audio was distorted :(

Even bought a shirt ! hahaha …

author: juanzelada
body: Wow! that really looks like a great show! And what a talent Mr. A to Z… completely agree with your second clue! what a voice!!! I love the fact that he’s a truly global artist and he plays everywhere!!! great review

author: admin
body:
@mr jp: Second row from the front? I was probably standing right behind you :P

@juanzelada: Thanks for stopping by. Are you going to release an official version of that “London Town” song of yours?
